name: hmcts-apim-sdlc-orchestrator
description: HMCTS API-Marketplace SDLC orchestrator — a fully self-contained, contract-first pipeline for OpenAPI-first api-cp-* spec libraries and service-cp-* Spring Boot services. Bundles all pipeline agents (requirements-analyst, apim-architect, story-writer, contract-test-engineer, implementation, code-reviewer, ci-orchestrator, deployer), the openapi-spec-reviewer skill, APIM context docs, and guard hooks. Targets GHA + ADO CI/CD, PMD, CodeQL, GHCR, and the cp-vp-aks-deploy GitOps repo.
